title: lithocarpus cryptocarpus
intro: Lithocarpus cryptocarpus, also known as the Cryptocarpous or California Nutmeg, is a species of evergreen tree native to California and Mexico. The tree's bark and leaves have been traditionally used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lithocarpus cryptocarpus are said to include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. In traditional herbal preparations, the bark and leaves are often made into teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness their medicinal properties.
